TEXT.citation: Early, R. J., & Whitehorn, J. (2003). One hundred Paiwan texts. Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University.
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @book{100paiwantexts, author = {Robert Early and John Whitehorn}, title = {One Hundred Paiwan Texts}, year = {2003}, publisher = {Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University}}
TEXT.source: told by Giɫgiɫaw of Vaɫulu village

S.FORM: izua za mareqali tia Piyaqan kati Tsabɫiɫaq.
S.PHON: izua za marəqaɭi tia pijaqan kati ʦabʎiʎaq.
S.FORM: izua za mareqali tia Piyaqan kati Cabljiljaq.
S.PHON: izua za marəqaɭi tia pijaqan kati ʦabʎiʎaq.
S.TRANSL: There were two friends called Piyaqan and Tsabɫiɫaq.

S.FORM: "ari kivala-i, qalian, sema ta vavayavayan," aya ti Piyaqan.
S.PHON: "ari kivaɭa-i, qaɭian, səma ta vavajavajan," aja ti pijaqan.
S.FORM: "ari kivala-i, qalian, sema ta vavayavayan," aya ti Piyaqan.
S.PHON: "ari kivaɭa-i, qaɭian, səma ta vavajavajan," aja ti pijaqan.
S.TRANSL: “Come on, friend, let’s go and visit the girls,” said Piyaqan.

S.FORM: "ari," aya ti Tsabɫiɫaq.
S.PHON: "ari," aja ti ʦabʎiʎaq.
S.FORM: "ari," aya ti Cabljiljaq.
S.PHON: "ari," aja ti ʦabʎiʎaq.
S.TRANSL: “Let’s go,” said Tsabɫiɫaq.

S.FORM: vaik tia mareqali a kivala sema tua vavayavayan.
S.PHON: vaik tia marəqaɭi a kivaɭa səma tua vavajavajan.
S.FORM: vaik tia mareqali a kivala sema tua vavayavayan.
S.PHON: vaik tia marəqaɭi a kivaɭa səma tua vavajavajan.
S.TRANSL: So the friends went to visit the girls.

S.FORM: tjumaq tia mareqali.
S.PHON: cumaq tia marəqaɭi.
S.FORM: tjumaq tia mareqali.
S.PHON: ʦumaq tia marəqaɭi.
S.TRANSL: The friends went indoors.

S.FORM: "kasinu mun, ɫa kiḍi," aya ti Piyaqan taza sudju nimadju a ti Kaɫaɫuɫaɫu.
S.PHON: "kasinu mun, ʎa kiɖi," aja ti pijaqan taza suɉu nimaɉu a ti kaʎaʎuʎaʎu.
S.FORM: "kasinu mun, lja kidri," aya ti Piyaqan taza sudju nimadju a ti Kaljaljuljalju.
S.PHON: "kasinu mun, ʎa kiɖi," aja ti pijaqan taza suɉu nimaɉu a ti kaʎaʎuʎaʎu.
S.TRANSL: “Where have you been to, girls?” said Piyaqan to his girl-friend Kaɫaɫuɫaɫu.

S.FORM: "na i umaq amen; 'ka i umaqi anga,' ka aya mun tjanuamen.
S.PHON: "na i umaq amən; 'ka i umaqi aŋa,' ka aja mun canuamən.
S.FORM: "na i umaq amen; 'ka i umaqi anga,' ka aya mun tjanuamen.
S.PHON: "na i umaq amən; ʔka i umaqi aŋa,ʔ ka aja mun ʦanuamən.
S.TRANSL: “We’ve been at home; seeing that you said ‘Let’s stay at home’.

S.FORM: qau kasinu mun avuaq?" aya ti Kaɫaɫuɫaɫu.
S.PHON: qau kasinu mun avuaq" aja ti kaʎaʎuʎaʎu.
S.FORM: qau kasinu mun avuaq?" aya ti Kaljaljuljalju.
S.PHON: qau kasinu mun avuaq" aja ti kaʎaʎuʎaʎu.
S.TRANSL: And where have you been today?” said Kaɫaɫuɫaɫu.

S.FORM: "namaya na i umaq amen uta.
S.PHON: "namaja na i umaq amən uta.
S.FORM: "namaya na i umaq amen uta.
S.PHON: "namaja na i umaq amən uta.
S.TRANSL: “We’ve been at home too.

S.FORM: ɫakua ika men a napatsun tjanusun.
S.PHON: ʎakua ika mən a napaʦun canusun.
S.FORM: ljakua ika men a napacun tjanusun.
S.PHON: ʎakua ika mən a napaʦun ʦanusun.
S.TRANSL: But we didn’t see you.

S.FORM: 'aki maya sema vavua,' aya men."
S.PHON: 'aki maja səma vavua,' aja mən."
S.FORM: 'aki maya sema vavua,' aya men."
S.PHON: ʔaki maja səma vavua,ʔ aja mən."
S.TRANSL: We thought you must have gone to the fields,” (said Piyaqan).

S.FORM: "navaik aken a venateq," aya ti Kaɫaɫuɫaɫu.
S.PHON: "navaik akən a vənatəq," aja ti kaʎaʎuʎaʎu.
S.FORM: "navaik aken a venateq," aya ti Kaljaljuljalju.
S.PHON: "navaik akən a vənatəq," aja ti kaʎaʎuʎaʎu.
S.TRANSL: “I went to wash clothes,” said Kaɫaɫuɫaɫu.

S.FORM: "djaɫepan a ika men a napatsun tjanusun; manu navaik sun a venateq," aya ti Piyaqan.
S.PHON: "ɉaʎəpan a ika mən a napaʦun canusun; manu navaik sun a vənatəq," aja ti pijaqan.
S.FORM: "djaljepan a ika men a napacun tjanusun; manu navaik sun a venateq," aya ti Piyaqan.
S.PHON: "ɉaʎəpan a ika mən a napaʦun ʦanusun; manu navaik sun a vənatəq," aja ti pijaqan.
S.TRANSL: “So that’s why we didn’t see you; you went to wash clothes,” said Piyaqan.

S.FORM: pai izua za qali a ti Tsabɫiɫaq ika qivuivu.
S.PHON: pai izua za qaɭi a ti ʦabʎiʎaq ika qivuivu.
S.FORM: pai izua za qali a ti Cabljiljaq ika qivuivu.
S.PHON: pai izua za qaɭi a ti ʦabʎiʎaq ika qivuivu.
S.TRANSL: Well his friend Tsabɫiɫaq didn’t say a word.

S.FORM: "makuda sun, qalian?
S.PHON: "makuda sun, qaɭian
S.FORM: "makuda sun, qalian?
S.PHON: "makuda sun, qaɭian
S.TRANSL: “What’s the matter with you, friend?

S.FORM: ika sun a qivuivu," aya ti Piyaqan taza qali nimadju.
S.PHON: ika sun a qivuivu," aja ti pijaqan taza qaɭi nimaɉu.
S.FORM: ika sun a qivuivu," aya ti Piyaqan taza qali nimadju.
S.PHON: ika sun a qivuivu," aja ti pijaqan taza qaɭi nimaɉu.
S.TRANSL: You haven’t said a word,” said Piyaqan to his friend.

S.FORM: "nuki ken a makuda tutsu; tjemengez aken sakamaya," aya ti Tsabɫiɫaq.
S.PHON: "nuki kən a makuda tuʦu; cəməŋəz akən sakamaja," aja ti ʦabʎiʎaq.
S.FORM: "nuki ken a makuda tucu; tjemengez aken sakamaya," aya ti Cabljiljaq.
S.PHON: "nuki kən a makuda tuʦu; ʦəməŋəz akən sakamaja," aja ti ʦabʎiʎaq.
S.TRANSL: “I don’t know what’s the matter with me now; I just feel sleepy,” said Tsabɫiɫaq.

S.FORM: "pai kataqedan, kama i Tsabɫiɫaq, nu tjemengez sun," aya ti Kaɫaɫuɫaɫu.
S.PHON: "pai kataqədan, kama i ʦabʎiʎaq, nu cəməŋəz sun," aja ti kaʎaʎuʎaʎu.
S.FORM: "pai kataqedan, kama i Cabljiljaq, nu tjemengez sun," aya ti Kaljaljuljalju.
S.PHON: "pai kataqədan, kama i ʦabʎiʎaq, nu ʦəməŋəz sun," aja ti kaʎaʎuʎaʎu.
S.TRANSL: “Well have a sleep then, old Tsabɫiɫaq, if you’re sleepy,” said Kaɫaɫuɫaɫu.

S.FORM: pai qemereng ti Tsabɫiɫaq.
S.PHON: pai qəmərəŋ ti ʦabʎiʎaq.
S.FORM: pai qemereng ti Cabljiljaq.
S.PHON: pai qəmərəŋ ti ʦabʎiʎaq.
S.TRANSL: So Tsabɫiɫaq lay down.

S.FORM: ini anan ka sekataqed.
S.PHON: ini anan ka səkataqəd.
S.FORM: ini anan ka sekataqed.
S.PHON: ini anan ka səkataqəd.
S.TRANSL: He didn’t go fast asleep;

S.FORM: manu namitaqedan ti Tsabɫiɫaq.
S.PHON: manu namitaqədan ti ʦabʎiʎaq.
S.FORM: manu namitaqedan ti Cabljiljaq.
S.PHON: manu namitaqədan ti ʦabʎiʎaq.
S.TRANSL: he just pretended to go to sleep.

S.FORM: "aku a sidudu nusa ti qalian a nataqed," aya ti Piyaqan.
S.PHON: "aku a sidudu nusa ti qaɭian a nataqəd," aja ti pijaqan.
S.FORM: "aku a sidudu nusa ti qalian a nataqed," aya ti Piyaqan.
S.PHON: "aku a sidudu nusa ti qaɭian a nataqəd," aja ti pijaqan.
S.TRANSL: “Blast this friend who has gone to sleep!” said Piyaqan.

S.FORM: manu kirimu a paqetjutj ti Piyaqan.
S.PHON: manu kirimu a paqəcuc ti pijaqan.
S.FORM: manu kirimu a paqetjutj ti Piyaqan.
S.PHON: manu kirimu a paqəʦuʦ ti pijaqan.
S.TRANSL: Straightaway Piyaqan broke wind.

S.FORM: "ha qalian, uza paqeqe anga sa kuka.
S.PHON: "ha qaɭian, uza paqəqə aŋa sa kuka.
S.FORM: "ha qalian, uza paqeqe anga sa kuka.
S.PHON: "ha qaɭian, uza paqəqə aŋa sa kuka.
S.TRANSL: “Come on, friend, the cocks are crowing;

S.FORM: gatsaɫu," aya ti Piyaqan tjai Tsabɫiɫaq.
S.PHON: gaʦaʎu," aja ti pijaqan cai ʦabʎiʎaq.
S.FORM: gacalju," aya ti Piyaqan tjai Cabljiljaq.
S.PHON: gaʦaʎu," aja ti pijaqan ʦai ʦabʎiʎaq.
S.TRANSL: get up!” said Piyaqan to Tsabɫiɫaq.

S.FORM: pai migatsaɫ ti Tsabɫiɫaq.
S.PHON: pai migaʦaʎ ti ʦabʎiʎaq.
S.FORM: pai migacalj ti Cabljiljaq.
S.PHON: pai migaʦaʎ ti ʦabʎiʎaq.
S.TRANSL: Tsabɫiɫaq got up.

S.FORM: "ika ken a nataqed, qalian," aya ti Tsabɫiɫaq.
S.PHON: "ika kən a nataqəd, qaɭian," aja ti ʦabʎiʎaq.
S.FORM: "ika ken a nataqed, qalian," aya ti Cabljiljaq.
S.PHON: "ika kən a nataqəd, qaɭian," aja ti ʦabʎiʎaq.
S.TRANSL: “I wasn’t asleep, friend,” said Tsabɫiɫaq.

S.FORM: manu ka paqetjutj ti Piyaqan, sipapazini taza qali nimadju a ti Tsabɫiɫaq.
S.PHON: manu ka paqəcuc ti pijaqan, sipapazini taza qaɭi nimaɉu a ti ʦabʎiʎaq.
S.FORM: manu ka paqetjutj ti Piyaqan, sipapazini taza qali nimadju a ti Cabljiljaq.
S.PHON: manu ka paqəʦuʦ ti pijaqan, sipapazini taza qaɭi nimaɉu a ti ʦabʎiʎaq.
S.TRANSL: So when Piyaqan broke wind he tried to put the blame on his friend Tsabɫiɫaq.

S.FORM: ɫakua manu ika nataqed.
S.PHON: ʎakua manu ika nataqəd.
S.FORM: ljakua manu ika nataqed.
S.PHON: ʎakua manu ika nataqəd.
S.TRANSL: But he hadn’t been asleep.

S.FORM: pai keɫangen tu timadju a napaqetjutj naza vavayavayan.
S.PHON: pai kəʎaŋən tu timaɉu a napaqəcuc naza vavajavajan.
S.FORM: pai keljangen tu timadju a napaqetjutj naza vavayavayan.
S.PHON: pai kəʎaŋən tu timaɉu a napaqəʦuʦ naza vavajavajan.
S.TRANSL: So the girls knew that it was Piyaqan who had broken wind.

S.FORM: pai kasuqelaman anga sakamaya ti Piyaqan naza vavayavayan.
S.PHON: pai kasuqəɭaman aŋa sakamaja ti pijaqan naza vavajavajan.
S.FORM: pai kasuqelaman anga sakamaya ti Piyaqan naza vavayavayan.
S.PHON: pai kasuqəɭaman aŋa sakamaja ti pijaqan naza vavajavajan.
S.TRANSL: So the girls disliked Piyaqan after that.

S.FORM: pai titjen nu ruburu itjen, kasuqelaman itjen nua tja salasaladj.
S.PHON: pai ticən nu ruburu icən, kasuqəɭaman icən nua ca saɭasaɭaɉ.
S.FORM: pai titjen nu ruburu itjen, kasuqelaman itjen nua tja salasaladj.
S.PHON: pai tiʦən nu ruburu iʦən, kasuqəɭaman iʦən nua ʦa saɭasaɭaɉ.
S.TRANSL: If we are liars our companions won’t like us.

S.FORM: ika tjen a kinasaluan nua qaliqali.
S.PHON: ika cən a kinasaɭuan nua qaɭiqaɭi.
S.FORM: ika tjen a kinasaluan nua qaliqali.
S.PHON: ika ʦən a kinasaɭuan nua qaɭiqaɭi.
S.TRANSL: People won’t trust us.
